tests.scenario: Show plan status on a locked feature before checkout
steps: Sign in as a non-premium user.
Open a screen that contains at least one locked feature.
Observe the locked feature before selecting it.
tests.expected_result: The feature is identified as free or premium before the user starts checkout.

tests.scenario: Display subscription details before purchase confirmation
steps: Open the premium upgrade flow.
Select one subscription option.
View the purchase summary screen.
tests.expected_result: The summary screen shows the price, billing period, renewal condition, and cancellation channel before the user confirms purchase.

tests.scenario: Save one reminder time for each check-in period
steps: Open reminder settings.
Set reminder times for morning, afternoon, and evening.
Save the settings.
tests.expected_result: The application stores and displays one saved reminder time for each of the three check-in periods.

tests.scenario: Submit a missed check-in under the intended period
steps: Miss one scheduled check-in period.
Open the app after the reminder window closes.
Select the missed period and submit answers.
tests.expected_result: The application accepts the missed check-in and stores it under the selected period.

tests.scenario: Save multiple mood entries from the same day with distinct times
steps: Open the mood logging feature.
Create one mood entry and save it.
Create a second mood entry later the same day and save it.
Open the saved entries.
tests.expected_result: Both saved entries are present and each entry shows its own recorded time.

tests.scenario: Display mood and reflection history in chronological order
steps: Save several mood entries and reflections on different dates.
Open the history view.
Review the order of the displayed entries.
tests.expected_result: The application displays the saved mood entries and reflections in chronological order.

tests.scenario: Save a written reflection with a mood entry
steps: Open the mood entry screen.
Select a mood and enter written reflection text.
Save the entry.
tests.expected_result: The saved mood entry includes the written reflection text.

tests.scenario: Show insight or exercise content after check-in submission
steps: Complete a check-in by recording current feelings.
Submit the check-in.
Observe the content shown after submission.
tests.expected_result: The application shows at least one related insight, reading, or exercise item after the check-in is submitted.

tests.scenario: Generate a progress summary for a tracked period
steps: Save mood entries across a tracked period.
Open the summary or report generation feature.
Generate a summary for that period.
tests.expected_result: The generated summary includes the mood patterns recorded during the selected period.

tests.scenario: Access mental health guidance resources in-app
steps: Open the application's guidance or support area.
Wait for the screen to load.
Review the content shown on the screen.
tests.expected_result: The application displays available mental health guidance resources.
